unavailableSources.exactOwnerAction: Upload the untouched original backup.pst to a private Google Drive folder named H38 Private Evidence Intake — Issue 34, or attach it directly in the active chat. Do not rename, open, export or resave it before upload.

closureRule: The available private evidence pass is complete. Remaining unavailable sources each have one exact owner action. Issue #34 may close under the posted unavailable-source clause after repository verification, merge, public link verification and closure reporting.
